meaning: 石勒喀河[苏联西伯利亚南部](黑龙江北源)
examples: Beside the barren Zeya he heard of the Shilka, where peas, barley and buckwheat grew.
In 1854 he raised an 800-strong Cossack unit and put it and the Albazino Madonna onto 50 barges at Stretensk on the Shilka.
The Russians retreated to Nerchinsk on the Shilka.
